overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from the sci-fi game Fort Solis. The player character explores a dimly lit, futuristic office quarters with teal ambient lighting, interacting with a wrist-mounted device and examining objects in furniture drawers. The environment features clean, modern industrial aesthetics with high-fidelity Unreal Engine rendering.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit office workstation with computer setup

events.description: brief first-person wrist device view transitions to third-person perspective behind character
character stands up from desk and begins walking toward side furniture

agents.ego_description: checking wrist device display then moving through the office space to examine the environment

entered.detail: desk with dual monitors displaying Fort Solis logo and sticky notes
wall covered with papers, diagrams, and colorful sticky notes
ergonomic chair positioned at the desk
tall shelving unit with books and red storage boxes

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with a close-up of a wrist device displaying 'TERRA / FORT SOLIS' before transitioning to a third-person view of a character in a dimly lit, teal-hued office. The character rises from a desk featuring dual monitors and a cluttered bulletin board, then moves toward a white console table. The environment features industrial sci-fi aesthetics with carpeted flooring and modern furniture.

scene_state.functional_zone: console table area with wrist device interaction

events.description: wrist device screen illuminates with red warning light, casting red glow on character's arm
character enters security code on wrist device keypad interface

agents.ego_description: standing at a white console table interacting with the wrist-mounted device to enter a security code

entered.detail: modern white table with illuminated base and curved design
green leafy plant in pot sitting on the console table
wall-mounted board with technical schematics and graphs

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a sleek white console table with an illuminated base and a potted plant. The camera focuses on the wrist device which glows red before displaying a keypad interface. The character enters a code while standing near a whiteboard covered in technical diagrams. The computer workstation and bulletin board from the previous area are now out of view.

events.description: character opens nightstand drawer revealing a silver flashlight inside
character picks up flashlight and rotates it to examine from multiple angles

agents.ego_description: opening a nightstand drawer and carefully examining a cylindrical flashlight object before the camera

entered.detail: dark colored drawer unit with silver handle positioned under whiteboard
cylindrical metal flashlight with textured grip and silver finish

segments.scene_description: The character moves to a dark nightstand beneath the whiteboard and opens the top drawer, revealing a metal flashlight. The camera bends down to focus on the drawer as the character picks up the flashlight and examines it closely, rotating it to inspect the textured grip and silver body. The console table and plant are no longer visible as the perspective shifts to the drawer area.

events.description: character places flashlight back in drawer and pushes it closed
wrist device displays warning message about Fort Solis facility

agents.ego_description: closing the drawer and raising arm to check the wrist device which now displays a warning notification

segments.scene_description: The character returns the flashlight to the drawer and closes it. Standing up from the nightstand, the character checks the wrist device which now displays a warning message about Fort Solis. The scene ends with the character standing near the closed drawer and bookshelf, with the wrist device screen visible showing the alert.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit, teal-hued futuristic office as the character transitions from a workstation to a detailed search of a storage area. It begins with a close-up of a wrist device before pulling back to show the character rising from a desk with dual monitors and moving toward a sleek white console table. As the character stops to enter a code into a glowing red keypad interface, the perspective shifts away from the workstation toward a whiteboard covered in technical diagrams. The camera then bends down to follow the character as they open a dark nightstand drawer to retrieve and closely inspect a silver metal flashlight. Finally, the character returns the item and stands upright, with the camera lingering on a warning message appearing on the wrist device beside a nearby bookshelf.
